## Test plan

<!-- How you verified this. Checkboxes for what you actually ran, not what's aspirational. -->

- [ ] `./mvnw verify` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has unit and/or `*IT` test coverage
- [ ] Docs updated (README/ARCHITECTURE/OpenAPI) if this changes a contract

## SDLC / review

- [ ] Linked to a PRD.md story / Jira key (if applicable)
- [ ] Ready for `/review-pr` (code-reviewer + security-auditor)
